prompts.label: First FastAPI app
prompts.text:
Create a minimal FastAPI app for a beginner.

- main.py with GET / returning {"message": "hello"}
- uvicorn run command
- requirements.txt with fastapi and uvicorn

Explain automatic OpenAPI docs URL.

prompts.label: Path and query parameters
prompts.text:
Teach path and query params in FastAPI.

- GET /items/{item_id} with item_id: int
- Optional query q: str | None
- Example URLs to try in browser

Include type hints and validation benefits.

prompts.label: POST with Pydantic model
prompts.text:
Add POST /items with a Pydantic model.

- Models ItemCreate and ItemResponse
- In-memory list store for demo
- Return 201 and created item

Explain Pydantic vs dict in 2 sentences.

prompts.label: Dependency injection intro
prompts.text:
Introduce Depends() with a fake database dependency.

- def get_db() generator yielding connection stub
- Route uses db=Depends(get_db)
- Why DI helps testing — 3 bullets

Keep code short.

prompts.label: HTTPException 404
prompts.text:
Show proper 404 errors in FastAPI.

- GET /users/{id} with fake list
- raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="User not found")
- How it appears in OpenAPI docs

One file example.

prompts.label: Router APIRouter modules
prompts.text:
Split FastAPI into routers for a small API.

- routers/users.py and routers/items.py
- Include_router in main.py with prefix /api

Explain project growth pattern.

prompts.label: CORS for frontend dev
prompts.text:
Enable CORS for local React/Vite on port 5173.

- CORSMiddleware settings
- Why browsers block cross-origin

Show main.py snippet only.

prompts.label: Async endpoint
prompts.text:
Explain async def routes in FastAPI briefly.

- One async route simulating await asyncio.sleep
- When to use async vs def for beginners

Runnable example.

prompts.label: JWT auth overview
prompts.text:
High-level JWT auth plan for FastAPI (no full production code).

- Login issues token, protected route needs Authorization header
- Outline libraries: python-jose, passlib
- Security warnings: HTTPS, secret key in env

Bullet roadmap for learning.

prompts.label: Connect SQLAlchemy later
prompts.text:
Explain steps to add SQLAlchemy + FastAPI after the tutorial API.

- Models, Session, lifespan event
- Migrations with Alembic mention
- Do not implement full ORM now — checklist only

For someone who finished in-memory CRUD.

prompts.label: lifespan context startup shutdown
prompts.text:
Replace deprecated on_event with lifespan context manager.
Show yielding control after DB engine init and closing pools on shutdown.
Explain why this beats scattered globals for beginners.
Touch test client lifespan behavior.
Keep example ~15 lines.

prompts.label: BackgroundTasks email pattern
prompts.text:
Demonstrate enqueueing BackgroundTasks after request returns vs blocking.
Discuss idempotency and retry limitations honestly.
Mention Celery/RQ upgrade path verbally.
Show logging hygiene inside tasks.
Warn about accessing request state after completion pitfalls.

prompts.label: UploadFile streams safely
prompts.text:
Walk through awaiting upload.read() cautiously vs streaming chunks.
Show saving under a sanitized filename pattern.
List size limits validation at settings layer.
Mention antivirus scanning hook idea.
Relate multipart parsing costs lightly.

prompts.label: Depends chains for permissions
prompts.text:
Compose Depends(get_db) chaining into Depends(require_role("admin")).
Explain caching Depends results per-request.
Show HTTPException layering.
Discuss testing overrides with app.dependency_overrides.
Relate OpenAPI docs visibility.

prompts.label: Response model excludes unset fields
prompts.text:
Teach response_model_exclude_unset controlling optional pydantic defaults.
Differentiate serialization vs validation steps.
Show returning ORM rows with computed fields caveat.
Mention aliases for outward JSON keys.
Point beginners to warnings about lazy loading ORM.

prompts.label: WebSocket echo minimal
prompts.text:
Provide tiny /ws endpoint echo with receive_text loop.
Explain disconnect handling try/except.
Contrast with Socket.IO feature set without diving deep.
Mention scaling websockets behind load balancers high level.
Include security note on auth subprotocols brief.

prompts.label: Settings via pydantic-settings
prompts.text:
Show BaseSettings model reading DATABASE_URL and DEBUG bool coercions.
Explain case sensitivity and env_file for local dev.
Warn about committing .env.
Discuss nested settings pattern optional.
Compare to plain os.getenv verbosity.

prompts.label: Exception handlers customizing JSON
prompts.text:
Register handler for RequestValidationError returning { error: { type, details } } shape.
Show logging integration points.
Differentiate validation vs HTTP errors.
Mention tracing ids option.
Provide client-friendly vs internal detail split idea.

prompts.label: TestClient pytest fixture
prompts.text:
Create app fixture yielding TestClient with dependency overrides using sqlite.
Demonstrate transactional rollback pattern idea.
Show assert response.json() schema roughly.
Explain async client note for newer httpx stacks lightly.
Add marker for integration vs unit separation.

prompts.label: OpenAPI tags and summary polish
prompts.text:
Decorate routers with tags and summarize operations for Swagger UI.
Explain include_router prefixes impact on paths.
Show response description examples.
Mention exporting OpenAPI JSON for clients.
Finish with hiding internal routes from docs pattern.
